name: Sinful Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Frozen Hash Brown potatoes, defrosted about 15 minutes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt Velveeta in a heavy pan over low heat, stirring.
3. Add Mayonnaise and potatoes to the cheese mixture and mix well.
4. Transfer the mixture into a 9 X 13 inch shallow baking dish and top with bacon.
5. Bake, uncovered for 35-40 minutes until bubbly and golden brown. Double the recipe and increase cooking time to 1 hour if desired.
